text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
173 
GAP_MOPP_COPAY_DAILY 
LABEL: 
Gap Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 1-day supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using a mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D 
benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_MOPP_COPAY_DAILY 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8
